Name: Intra Tours DMC in Turkey
Description:
Intra Tourism Group - an outstanding partner in a uniquely exciting destination - providing travel solutions in Turkey since 1980.

Intra Tourism Group is one of Turkey’s longest-established ground handling agents and destination management companies, providing innovative solutions, reliable services and competitive pricing for all of your clients’ MICE, business, cultural and leisure travel needs.

Intra Tourism Group has a dedicated team of tourism professionals whose skills include everything from aircraft charter operations to event planning and incentive management. They have experience serving clients ranging from package tour visitors to high-end FIT travelers and corporate groups for both meetings and incentives.

Intra Tourism Group’s extensive capabilities and experience allow you to make the most of travel opportunities in a unique country set at the crossroads of continents: Turkey. Whether in cosmopolitan Istanbul, extraordinary Cappadocia or beautiful Antalya, Turkey offers the exotic allure of the Orient combined with the high quality accommodations, superior meeting and banqueting facilities, shopping and nightlife one would expect from the most sophisticated European cities. Turkey is as old as time itself, yet also young and dynamic, cosmopolitan and eclectic.

Allow Intra Tourism Group to introduce your travelers to the best that Turkey has to offer...

Founded in 1947, we have asserted ourselves as being the benchmark for high quality transport engineering, creating exceptional vehicles and infrastructure for the most demanding global customer requirements. Today Severn Lamb is world renowned and service clients' needs worldwide.

Name: THINK TOURS
Description:
Love for people, ecotourism and the desire to share the incredible waterfronts, islands , touristic highlands and plains brimming with a blend of nature and culture and mangroves of Cameroon  are what makes Think Tours Cameroon a great choice.

We offer award winning sightseeing tours. We pride in providing safe and exciting eco tours on Douala’s breathtaking and exclusive waterfronts.

Our spectacular city belt tours take you on a journey through the most exclusive waterfronts and their rich history with a view of Douala’s enchanting Islands, amazing ancient architecture, dark waters and mangrove forest.

We also offer an exclusive curated tours through out the major touristic destinations of Cameroon from the far north down to the south region of this nation known to be mini Africa.

Take photos of historical and nature healing sites from the comfort of Think Tour rides or boats as you explore with friends, family, as an individual or in a group.

Name: ProCars
Description:
ProCars, transporteur routier de voyageurs, privé et indépendant, d'Île-de-France.

La société est fondée en 1950 par Jean-Pierre Jouy qui reprend alors la ligne de marché Donnemarie-Nangis. Depuis, ProCars n'a eu de cesse de croitre grâce à qualité de service reconnue. Aujourd'hui, avec ses filiales de transport & voyage, la société est présente en Île-de-France, en Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, en région Grand Est et en Centre-Val de Loire. 

L’offre couvre tous les services de transports collectifs routiers de voyageurs, en car et bus, des lignes régulières, des services urbains, du transport à la demande, du transport de personnes à mobilité réduite, du transport scolaire, du transport de personnel, et les services occasionnels et événementiels.

Pour le tourisme individuel ou en groupe, ProCars s’appuie sur son partenaire, l’agence de voyages AlbaVoyages, dont l’expérience est appréciée jusque dans les institutions parisiennes.

L’activité touristique est complétée à Provins par l’exploitation des Petits Trains de Provins dans le cadre de la cité médiévale.

Chiffres clés de ProCars et de ses 6 filiales :
- Premier transporteur routier de voyageurs privé et indépendant d'Île-de-France
- 350 collaborateurs
- 280 véhicules
- 13 dépôts et sites 
- CA 28 M€

En Nueva Ruta KAWESKAR los viajeros conoceran Puerto Natales - Glaciares Guillard, Amalia, El Brujo - Fiordo Calvo Fiordo de las Montañas. Realiza zarpes desde OCTUBRE a ABRIL con duración de 4 noches en MN Skorpios III.

MISIÓN: Formamos parte de una sociedad que brinda un excelente servicio de movilidad ágil, eficiente, cómodo y sostenible para conocer las ciudades y lugares de interés de donde nos encontramos, respondiendo a las dinámicas del mundo y contribuyendo a una mejora en cuanto a la movilidad y mejorando la calidad de vida de los usuarios de nuestro servicio.

Description:

It was founded in 2005 by a team of experienced marine biologists determined to promote scientific research and conservation of cetaceans, as well as protect and preserve the underwater world.

Mar Ilimitado (meaning: "Unlimited Sea") develops its own research projects (cetacean monitoring and photo-identification, diving exploration, etc) in which tourists can get involved. It also carries out projects in cooperation with some Institutes and Universities, by promoting the development of research topics (thesis, etc) and ong term monitoiring of marine wildlife and ecossystems.

Name: AN.BTI - CONFCOMMERCIO
Description:
L’Associazione Nazionale Bus Turistici Italiani AN.BTI - CONFCOMMERCIO nasce dal Comitato Bus Turistici Italiani, il primo raggruppamento di aziende del settore in Italia. Una realtà, nata in conseguenza della crisi sanitaria che sta interessando anche l’Italia e che, attualmente, conta l’affiliazione della maggior parte delle aziende titolari di Bus Turistici.

Una realtà che, tradotta in numeri, significa più di 25mila posti di lavoro, altrettanti bus che viaggiano sulle strade ed autostrade italiane, 2,5 miliardi annui di fatturato, 1,7 miliardi di chilometri percorsi ogni anno, 450 milioni di litri di carburante consumati. Oltre ad un indotto che comprende guide, accompagnatori, officine, carrozzieri, costruttori, assicurazioni, gommisti, elettrauto e – non ultimo – l’acquisto di mezzi, che ogni anno genera l’immatricolazione di circa 750 bus, con un fatturato totale di circa 220 milioni di euro. Un settore che genera anche importanti ricadute sui bilanci pubblici, se si contano i circa 270 milioni di accise derivanti dall’acquisto di carburanti ed ulteriori 100 milioni di euro incassati direttamente dai comuni attraverso i tickets bus.

A causa del coronavirus quello dei bus turistici è stato il primo settore a fermarsi e, presumibilmente, sarà l’ultimo a ripartire. In questo contesto il Comitato nasceva proprio con la volontà di dare voce ad un comparto non adeguatamente considerato da Istituzioni ed opinione pubblica ed ha trovato il proprio compimento con la trasformazione in Associazione il 17 novembre 2021 e nell'ingresso in Confcommercio del 2022

Name: deSta- dekoloniale Stadtführung
Description:
Wir bieten alternative Stadtführungen im Afrikanischen Viertel in Berlin an. 

Dekoloniale Perspektiven sind heute so wichtig wie lange nicht mehr. Um Rassismus und rechtsextreme Einstellungen abzubauen müssen wir den Nationalsozialismus als Kontinuität anerkennen. Es gilt zu verstehen, dass rassistische Weltbilder bereits seit 500 Jahren bestehen und verbreitet werden. 
Der Kolonialismus hat einen wesentlichen Teil dazu beigetragen, dass Rassismus salonfähig wurde und bis heute aufrechterhalten wird. 
Mit unseren Stadtführungen zeigen wir wie selbst im öffentlichen Raum rassismen reproduziert und legitimiert werden. 

Finde heraus was sich hinter den Straßennamen wie Kamerunerstraße, Ghanastraße und der Lüderitzstraße verbirgt. 
Gemeinsam entdecken wir die spannende Geschichte des Viertels.

Unsere öffentlichen Führungen finden jedes Wochenende statt. Immer um 11 Uhr auf Deutsch und 14Uhr auf Englisch. Buche dein Ticket einfach über die Webseite. 
Für private Gruppen bieten wir auch Führungen unter der Woche zu individuellen Terminen. Du kannst uns einfach anschreiben. 

Vergiss nicht unseren Newsletter zu abonnieren um auf dem Laufenden zu bleiben. Www.dekolonialestadtfuehrung.de/newsletter/

Name: Ozeroute
Description:
Ozeroute, a renowned European leader in on-demand airport transportation, presents a diverse range of shuttle services designed to meet your specific requirements:
Economy Shuttle Service: Experience the reliability and affordability of our scheduled shuttles, operating seamlessly between fixed points (Point to Point). Enjoy cost-effective transportation tailored to your travel needs.
Premium Shuttle Service: Indulge in our exclusive offering that takes convenience to new heights. Our extended economy shuttles provide direct transportation to your specified address (Point to door), ensuring a luxurious and stress-free journey.
Private Transfer: For those seeking ultimate privacy and personalized service, our private transfer options are the perfect choice. Our professional drivers will transport you to and from your designated addresses (Door to door), offering unmatched comfort and convenience.
At Ozeroute, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional services that prioritize your comfort, reliability, and satisfaction. Choose the shuttle service that aligns with your needs and allow us to exceed your expectations.
Ozeroute serves a wide range of destinations, including all major airports in Paris such as Orly Airport (ORY), Charles de Gaulle Airport (CDG), and Beauvais-Tillé Airport (BVA), as well as popular sites like Disneyland and Parc Astérix. Additionally, we provide seamless transportation to and from various locations, including hotels, train stations, homes, and amusement parks.
Experience the epitome of premium shuttle services with Ozeroute and enjoy a truly remarkable travel experience.

Name: Banff Day Trips
Description:
Sometimes I think back to how all of this started—just me wanting to share the Rockies I love with people who’d never seen them before. Over time, that simple idea grew into Banff Day Trips, a boutique, owner-led experience company where every tour feels personal, welcoming, and crafted with real heart. And the best part is that it’s not just me anymore. Our whole team genuinely loves what we do—you can feel it in the laughter on the trails, the energy in the van, and the countless reviews from guests who say it’s our passion that made their trip unforgettable.

We design each moment with intention: the golden-hour viewpoints, the cozy, comfort-forward stops, the storytelling, the un-rushed pace… all the little touches that make people feel like they’re exploring with friends who know all the good spots.

And because not everyone wants to juggle logistics, we’ve expanded into fully curated travel packages too—flights, lodging, everything handled—so guests can simply show up, relax, and let the magic unfold. It’s been incredible to see how freeing that is for people.

At the end of the day, what we love most is creating those “wow” moments that stay with people long after they’ve gone home. The mountains do their part, of course, but our team brings the warmth, the care, and the joy that turn a beautiful place into an unforgettable experience.

We’d love to share that magic with you. Whenever you’re ready for your next adventure—whether it’s a simple day trip or a fully curated escape—our team will be here, excited to welcome you and make your time in the Rockies truly unforgettable.

İzmir'in sahil kasabalarını keşfetmek isteyin, her zaman sizin yanınızdayız. Ayrıca, müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı hizmet anlayışımızla, sizlere özel transfer hizmetleri sunmaktayız. VIP araçlarımızda unutulmaz bir yolculuk deneyimi yaşayabilirsiniz.Tüm bunların yanında, araçlarımızı düzenli olarak bakım ve onarım işlemlerine tabi tutarak, güvenli ve konforlu bir seyahat için gerekli tüm önlemleri almaktayız. Hizmetlerimizdeki kalite standartlarımızı sürekli yükseltmek için çalışıyoruz ve sizleri en iyi şekilde ağırlamak için hazırız.

Name: Morocco Excursion Tours
Description: Morocco Excursion Tours offer an immersive and enchanting experience, weaving through the rich tapestry of this North African gem. From the bustling markets of Marrakech to the serene landscapes of the Atlas Mountains, these tours unveil the diverse facets of Morocco’s cultural and geographical splendor. Visitors can explore the labyrinthine streets of ancient medinas, where vibrant spices and intricate handicrafts beckon from every corner. The Sahara Desert, with its vast golden dunes, provides a surreal backdrop for camel treks and stargazing under the desert night sky. As travelers traverse the country, they encounter the architectural wonders of cities like Fes, known for its UNESCO-listed medieval medina, and the coastal charm of Essaouira.

Name: s/v Valborg
Description:
Perinnepurjelaiva s/v Valborg on tunnelmallinen ja ainutlaatuinen tapahtumapaikka, merellä tai Halkolaiturissa. Valborg on täydellinen valinta, kun haluat tarjota elämyksiä, joita ei unohdeta.

Valborgilla järjestät vaikuttavat asiakastilaisuude, rennot tiimipäivät tai ikimuistoiset juhlat Helsingin saariston maisemissa. Purjehdus tarjoaa tilaa keskusteluilla, yhdessäololle ja läsnäololle. 

Aina ei kuitenkaan tarvitse lähteä merelle, vaan Valborg palvelee myös kotisatamassaan Halkolaiturissa.

Jokaisen elämyksen kruunaa ammattitaitoinen miehistö, herkulliset tarjoilut ja aito merellinen tunnelma.

Kapasiteetti
 Saaristossa 95 henkeä
 Itämerellä 40 henkeä
 Yöpymispaikkoja 32

 Rakennettu 1948
 Pituus 36 m
 Leveys 7,2 m
 Syväys 2,4 m
 Purjepinta-ala 350 m2
 Yhtenäinen, tilava ruuma

Seja por sinistro, por avaria ou simplesmente, porque por vezes não compensa ás empresas ter este tipo de viaturas para uma ocupação sazonal.

Com o objectivo de cada vez mais ir de encontro ás necessidades dos nossos clientes, no início do ano de 2005 a wh-executive service lança em portugal pela primeira vez o executive car service, um serviço que inclui todos os serviços que as empresas possam necessitar em termos de transporte.

Este novo serviço vai assim incluir todo um leque de serviços que vai desde o transfer e transporte de executivos até ao simples aluguer de uma viatura de luxo, passando pelo pedido de um chauffer para as necessidades das empresas.

From Hanford, Tulare, and Visalia, transportation will be provided to several vineyards in the Paso Robles area before finally returning.

Our typical tours last about 8 hours, visiting a minimum of 3 wineries and savoring the taste of each along the way. All tours include a complimentary continental breakfast and lunch. If you are in Hanford, you can also avail our At-home Pickup service, where our Sprinter shuttle will pick you up from your home at a pre-arranged time.

Name: EC VIAGENS
Description:
O que é a EC Viagens?

Tudo começou ouvindo várias dúvidas mundo afora.

Notando pessoas perdidas em meio a tantos detalhes e deixando de aproveitar ao máximo aquele momento tão especial, que muitas vezes é construído com muito esforço, privações e grandes economias.



Então, enquanto tentava ajudar quem eu conseguia, tirando dúvidas, passando informações e dividindo um pouco do meu conhecimento, me perguntei, por quê não?

Por que não ajudar mais pessoas a terem ótimas memórias, desses momentos tão esperados.

Mas como?

Então, me dei conta que a internet era o melhor meio para isso.

Eu que amo tanto viajar, decidi me tornar comissária de voo, uma experiência que me permite conhecer novos lugares constantemente.

Foi então que percebi, que ajudaria muitas pessoas montando a melhor agência em assessoria para viagens que eu pudesse.

Tendo como valores principais, respeito ao sonho daqueles que tanto se dedicam para tal realização, gratidão pela possibilidade de dividir meu conhecimento com aqueles que confiam seus sonhos a mim e amor.



Esta é a EC Viagens.

É uma honra ter você aqui comigo.



Te vejo no próximo voo ;)

Name: Normandy Premium Tours
Description:
Welcome to Normandy Premium Tours - Your Expert Guide to Discovering Normandy!

At Normandy Premium Tours, we specialize in creating unforgettable experiences for those eager to explore the rich history, stunning landscapes, and vibrant culture of Normandy, France. Based in Le Havre, we are ideally positioned to welcome international travelers arriving by cruise ships and others seeking to dive deep into the heart of Normandy.

What We Offer:

Tailored Tours: From the world-renowned Mont Saint Michel to the poignant D-Day Beaches, the picturesque towns of Honfleur, Etretat, and Deauville, and even day trips to the enchanting Paris, our tours are designed to cater to a wide range of interests.
Expert Guides: Our knowledgeable guides are passionate about sharing the stories and secrets of Normandy, ensuring an enriching and authentic experience.
Personalized Experience: Whether you're a solo traveler, a couple, or part of a larger group, we offer customizable tours to suit your unique preferences and needs.
Why Choose Us?

Local Insights: As locals, we provide insights that go beyond the typical tourist paths, offering a genuine connection to the places and people of Normandy.
Quality Service: We believe in offering exceptional service, from the moment you book with us to the end of your journey.
Memorable Moments: Our goal is to create lasting memories for every guest, ensuring that your time in Normandy is not just a trip, but a truly remarkable experience.

Name: Tracknet Transport Te Anau
Description:
Kia ora and welcome to Tracknet, Fiordland's Track and Transport Specialists for over 30 Years.

Tracknet offer reliable daily passenger coach service to and from many of the most beautiful areas of the South Island, New Zealand.


During the Great Walks season (27th October to 30th April ).

Tracknet bus services travel each day between Queenstown, Te Anau, Milford Sound. Services connect to all Southern New Zealand's walking tracks including Fiordland's Great Walks; the Milford Track, Routeburn Track, Kepler Track, Hollyford Track, Greenstone and Caples tracks.


Winter Timetables operate between Queenstown, Te Anau 5 days per week (Monday to Friday from 1st May to 23rd October ).

Charter services and winter season transport options are available by arrangement and on demand Kepler Track, Milford Track, Routeburn Track and Hollyford Track transport is operated.

The Kepler Track Shuttle was the first Tracknet Transport dedicated to trampers walking this superb trail.

Since 1988 Tracknet has had a policy that we will only utilise a vehicle which has enough seats to do the job. Therefore we do not always require 45 seater vehicles and their associated unneccesary use of fosil fuels.

Name: Steve’s Peninsula Tours
Description:
Steve’s Peninsula Tours offers private guided experiences across the Dingle Peninsula and beyond, combining local storytelling, historical insight, and personal charm. Whether you're exploring ancient sites, heading to a wedding, or need a transfer to Kerry or Shannon Airport, our comfortable, licensed vehicle and professional chauffeur service ensure a seamless and memorable journey.

Based in the heart of County Kerry, we serve tourists, locals, and corporate clients with personalised tours and transfers.

Services Include:
– Full-day guided tours (Dingle Peninsula, Slea Head, Ring of Kerry)
– Airport & hotel transfers
– Chauffeur hire for weddings, events, funerals, and corporate travel
– Evenings out and late-night restaurant or pub returns

Slea Head Half-Day Tour
Explore the Slea Head Drive on a relaxed half-day tour. Take in stunning Atlantic views, ancient beehive huts, and beaches seen in film. With plenty of stops for photos and stories, this private experience offers beauty, culture, and comfort.

Dingle Peninsula Full-Day Tour
Uncover the Dingle Peninsula’s rich history and dramatic landscapes. From Inch Beach to the Blasket Islands, explore ancient ruins, coastal roads, and colourful villages at your own pace, with time for lunch and scenic stops.

Ring of Kerry Full-Day Tour
Travel the iconic Ring of Kerry in comfort on a private full-day tour. Go clockwise from Dingle through mountains, lakes, and coastal views. Visit historic sites and local gems while enjoying a flexible and personalised experience.

 Korku Ormanı (Davranışsal Medya): Dünyanın ilk biyometrik veri tabanlı, gerçek zamanlı korku ve dayanıklılık simülasyonu.

Biz, seyahatin gücünü ve maceranın heyecanını yaşamayı seven bir ekip olarak çeşitli tur hizmetleri sunuyoruz. Yolculuğunuzu unutulmaz bir deneyim haline getirmek için buradayız.

Sizlere sunduğumuz:

 Özgün Tur Programları: Eşsiz destinasyonlara özel tasarlanmış turlarla dünyayı keşfedin.

 Unutulmaz Manzaralar: Doğanın ve kültürün güzelliklerini keşfedin ve paylaşın.

 Kurumsal Hizmetler: İş seyahatlerinizi ve kurumsal etkinliklerinizi özelleştirilmiş tur deneyimleriyle birleştirin.

Biz, seyahatinizi kişiselleştirmek ve sizin için en iyi deneyimi sunmak için buradayız. Yeni maceralar ve keşifler için bize katılın.

Name: Perú Sightseeing
Description:
Perú Sightseeing - Tu Socio Experto Local.

En Perú Sightseeing, somos un operador de turismo mayorista especializado en brindar experiencias únicas y auténticas en Perú. Nuestro enfoque principal es el **mercado B2B**, colaborando con agencias de viajes y tour operadores de todo el mundo para ofrecer paquetes turísticos diseñados con excelencia y profesionalismo.

Desde la mística Machu Picchu hasta las maravillas culturales de Lima y Cusco, garantizamos un servicio de alta calidad, guiado por expertos y con un enfoque personalizado para cada cliente.\
Construimos alianzas estratégicas para llevar lo mejor de Perú al mundo!

---

Perú Sightseeing - Your Local Expert.

At Perú Sightseeing, we are a wholesale tourism operator specializing in providing unique and authentic experiences throughout Peru. Our primary focus is the **B2B market**, working closely with travel agencies and tour operators worldwide to offer expertly designed and professional tour packages.

From the mystical Machu Picchu to the cultural wonders of Lima and Cusco, we guarantee high-quality service, guided by experts, with a personalized approach for every client.\
We build strategic partnerships to showcase the best of Peru to the world!

Name: Domaine skiable des Habères
Description:
Nichées au cœur de la Vallée Verte en Haute-Savoie, les Habères offrent une expérience unique de la montagne, authentique et familiale. Relié à la station d’Hirmentaz, le domaine skiable s’étend sur près de 50 km de pistes, avec une vue imprenable sur le Mont Blanc, le lac Léman et les Alpes du Chablais.
En hiver, les Habères accueillent skieurs et snowboarders sur un domaine varié, accessible à tous les niveaux :
- Pistes familiales et panoramiques, idéales pour la découverte,
-Zones techniques pour les plus expérimentés,
-Espaces ludiques pour les enfants.

En été, la montagne se transforme en un terrain de jeu grandeur nature :
-Pistes de VTT et itinéraires DH,
-Sentiers de randonnée entre forêts et alpages,
-Activités de pleine nature pour toute la famille.
Avec ses remontées mécaniques, son atmosphère conviviale et son cadre naturel préservé, le domaine des Habères se distingue comme une station à taille humaine, où authenticité et plaisir de la montagne priment sur la sur-fréquentation.
Les Habères, c’est la montagne version vraie : des saisons rythmées par la nature, entre neige et soleil, toujours dans un décor exceptionnel.

Name: PdG Boat Tours & Accommodations
Description:
PdG - Boat Tours & Accommodations è un’agenzia operativa nel settore del charter nautico e dell’hospitality turistica con base a Sorrento.

Nel ramo boat tours e charter, offriamo servizi di noleggio con equipaggio e tour privati via mare lungo la Costiera Amalfitana, Capri, Ischia, Procida e il Golfo di Napoli. Nella nostra flotta sono presenti imbarcazioni di diverse dimensioni permettendoci di soddisfare le diverse richieste che ci giungono ogni giorno.

L’attività è integrata da una divisione incoming turistica, con diverse soluzioni ricettive tra cui:

- Palazzo delle Grazie, elegante struttura nel centro storico di Sorrento, con camere di charme e servizi boutique;
- Case vacanza e appartamenti distribuiti strategicamente tra Sorrento e Positano.

Il nostro modello è quello di un operatore locale altamente specializzato, capace di integrare l’esperienza nautica con servizi a terra, garantendo assistenza diretta e personalizzata in ogni fase del soggiorno.

PdG rappresenta oggi un punto di riferimento per chi cerca un servizio affidabile, professionale e su misura nel settore del turismo esperienziale e marittimo in Campania.

Name: Skyway Travel Cappadocia
Description:
Founded in the heart of Cappadocia, Skyway Travel has grown from a boutique hot air balloon operator into one of Turkey’s most trusted and dynamic travel agencies. 

Since 2015, we have been crafting unforgettable travel experiences across the country, from the mystical valleys of Cappadocia to the vibrant streets of Istanbul, the sun-kissed shores of Antalya, and the ancient wonders of Pamukkale.
 
With a strong commitment to personalized service, we believe every journey should be as unique as the traveler. 

Our professional team curates tailor-made tours, combining comfort, cultural immersion, and seamless logistics.
 
Our excellence extends beyond local experience.
Skyway Travel is a top-rated partner on the world’s leading travel platforms including GetYourGuide, Viator, TripAdvisor, and Klook. 

We consistently receive high customer satisfaction scores and five-star reviews. Our balloon tours are among the most booked and most loved experiences in the region, trusted by thousands of travelers each year.
 
What We Offer
•Hot Air Balloon Rides over the dreamlike landscapes of Cappadocia
•Daily and Private Tours across major Turkish destinations
•Transportation and Accommodation Solutions for every budget
•Custom Travel Planning based on your pace, interests, and style
 
Why Travelers Choose Skyway Travel
•Proven experience with thousands of happy guests
•Fast, friendly, and flexible customer service
•Strong online presence and seamless booking options
•Competitive pricing with no compromise on quality
 
Let Skyway Travel take you beyond sightseeing into moments that stay with you for a lifetime.

PT - Descubra os segredos maravilhosos da Costa Algarvia e o segredo mais guardado da Europa connosco.
Ocean Quest nasceu em 2017, a visão de um casal jovem empreendedor com um desejo de partilhar a sua paixão pela Costa Algarvia e com uma missão de oferecer qualidade de serviço com profissionalismo e excelência aos seus clientes.
Com diversos programas a bordo do nosso barco mãe Ocean Quest, queremos proporcionar-lhe a melhor experiência possível. Passeios á costa, explorar as grutas, observação de cetáceos, festas ao pôr de sol, alugueres privados, eventos personalizados.
Em 2021 foi adicionado a nossa frota um Axopar 24 Speed Boat e agora em 2023 um barco desenhado especificamente para a atividade parasailing.

ING - Discover the wonders of the Algarve coastline and Europe's best kept secret with us.
Ocean Quest was born in 2017 with the vision of a young entrepreneurial couple wanting to share their passion for the Algarve and it´s coastline with all it has to offer with a mission of customer satisfaction.
Our ambition is to provide a quality of service with professionalism and excellence. Providing various boat trips aboard our mother catamaran Ocean Quest we want to proportion the best experience possible, cave & coastline trips, dolphin searching, sunset cruises, private charter and tailored made events.
In 2021 we added to our fleet an Axopar 24ft speed boat and now in 2023 a boat specifically designed for parasailing.
Our slogan “Life is Beautiful” is the passion that moves us, to show you the best the Algarve has to offer!

Bienvenue chez Bassyam Voyage, votre compagnon de voyage de confiance au Burkina Faso ! Nous sommes bien plus qu'une simple agence de voyage - nous sommes votre passerelle vers des aventures inoubliables et des expériences enrichissantes.

Spécialisés dans l'organisation de colonies de vacances pour les enfants, nous sommes dévoués à offrir des moments magiques et éducatifs à vos petits explorateurs. Des activités ludiques et éducatives, des excursions passionnantes et un encadrement attentif garantissent des souvenirs inoubliables pour vos enfants.

En plus de nos programmes pour enfants, nous proposons une gamme complète de services pour faciliter vos voyages. De l'assistance pour l'obtention de visas et de passeports à la location de bus pour vos déplacements, nous nous occupons de tous les détails pour que votre voyage soit sans souci et mémorable.

Chez Bassyam Voyage, nous croyons que chaque voyage est une occasion de découvrir, d'apprendre et de se connecter avec le monde qui nous entoure. Laissez-nous vous guider dans cette aventure et créer des souvenirs qui dureront toute une vie.

Name: Versis America srl
Description:
Versis America e' ad oggi uno dei tour operator italiani leader in viaggi e tour negli Stati Uniti. La sua programmazione include anche il Messico e l'area caraibica, sia come prolungamento fisiologico di un viaggio negli USA, sia come soluzione di viaggio fine a se stessa. Un viaggio negli Stati Uniti è la soluzione ideale per chi desidera poter godere di panorami mozzafiato, immersi nella natura incontaminata dei parchi nazionali, senza rinunciare alle atmosfere e alle mille luci delle più famose metropoli americane.
Scegli la formula di viaggio più adatta alle tue esigenze tra i tour organizzati se desideri non preoccuparti di nulla, oppure tra i Fly and Drive se preferisci viaggiare in assoluta libertà. In entrambi i casi affidati all'orgnizzazione di un Tour Operator specializzato sugli USA.
La nostra migliore pubblicità sono i vostri ricordi e il vostro entusiasmo!
L'accurata selezione di viaggi che proponiamo nasce dalle attente scelte di un qualificato team di esperti che mette in campo tutta l'esperienza maturata i anni di attività per offrire ai nostri clienti la migliore combinazione degli elementi che comporranno il loro viaggio.
Lavoriamo costantemente sulla qualità dei servizi per assicurarci la totale soddisfazione dei nostri clienti in quanto siamo pienamente consapevoli che per noi la migliore pubblicità siano i vostri ricordi e l'entusiamo che ancora vi pervaderà alla fine del viaggio.
Il nostro è un prodotto turistico di qualità, costruito con voli di linea delle principali compagnie aeree internazionali, con le quali negli anni abbiamo costruito intensi rapporti di collaborazione che ci consentono di offrirvi le migliori tariffe aeree sulle destinazioni oggetto della nostra programmazione.

Name: BACALAR PUEBLO MÁGICO
Description:
Bienvenidos a Bacalar Pueblo Mágico, tu guía personal para explorar y sumergirte en la maravilla que es Bacalar, Quintana Roo. Desde la tranquilidad de sus aguas turquesas hasta los secretos históricos que yacen en sus calles, estamos aquí para hacerte vivir una experiencia única.

Nuestros Productos y Servicios:

 Tours en Velero Monocasco y Lancha: Descubre Bacalar desde sus aguas, explorando sus rincones más bellos y disfrutando de atardeceres que te robarán el aliento.

 Hospedaje Único: Te ayudamos a encontrar el alojamiento perfecto para que tu estadía en Bacalar sea cómoda y memorable, desde acogedores hostales hasta cabañas frente a la laguna.

 Experiencias Gastronómicas: Sumérgete en los sabores auténticos de Bacalar con nuestras recomendaciones de restaurantes y platillos locales que te harán viajar a través del paladar.

 Recomendaciones Turísticas: Te guiamos por los lugares más icónicos y los secretos mejor guardados de Bacalar, asegurándonos de que no te pierdas nada en tu visita.

 Atardeceres Inolvidables: Disfruta de atardeceres mágicos desde distintos puntos de Bacalar, creando recuerdos que durarán toda la vida.

En Bacalar Pueblo Mágico, nuestro compromiso es hacer que tu experiencia en este paraíso sea inolvidable. Únete a nosotros para explorar la belleza, la historia y la cultura que hacen de Bacalar un lugar verdaderamente mágico.  #BacalarPuebloMágico #ExploreBacalar #DescubreLaMagia

Description:
Bem-vindo à 048 Turismo, a companhia de transporte que combina qualidade, versatilidade e compromisso com os seus passageiros.

Nossa empresa se destaca pela ampla frota que possuímos, além da colaboração com diversos parceiros em todo o estado. Isso nos permite oferecer um serviço ágil e eficiente, sempre focado no melhor atendimento e no máximo conforto aos nossos clientes. Afinal, a satisfação dos passageiros é a base dos nossos princípios.

Mais do que transportar pessoas, a 048 Turismo tem como objetivo criar uma experiência única. Valorizamos a importância da família e do bom atendimento, justamente como gostaríamos de ser tratados. Combinamos a magia da Ilha de Santa Catarina com a excelência em serviços de transporte.

Estamos ansiosos para mostrar a você todo o encanto que a 048 Turismo tem a oferecer.

Embarque conosco na busca incessante pela perfeição!

Great Day To...: Our 24’ Sea Hunt center console boat, designed for a more adventurous outing, perfect for exploring unique areas like Midnight Pass, fishing, and more.

Dolphin and Manatee Watching: Watch these incredible creatures in their natural habitat, a must-see for nature lovers.
Sharks' Tooth Hunting and Shelling: Take a walk on secluded beaches and search for treasures that the Gulf waters have washed ashore.
Private Charters: For those seeking a more exclusive experience, we offer private charters for events, family gatherings, or just a special day on the water.
At Great Day Boat Tours, we take pride in offering exceptional customer service and creating memories that last. Our boats are equipped with comfortable seating, shaded areas, and cooling misters to ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

LMC Turizm olarak, misafirlerimize unutulmaz anlar yaşatmak ve İstanbul’un büyüleyici atmosferini en derin şekilde hissettirmek için tutkuyla çalışıyoruz.

Kurulduğumuz günden bu yana, kalite, güvenilirlik ve müşteri memnuniyeti ilkeleri doğrultusunda hareket ediyoruz. Uzman rehberlerimizle donatılmış özenle planlanmış turlarımız ve konforlu transfer hizmetlerimizle misafirlerimizin beklentilerini en üst seviyede karşılamayı amaçlıyoruz.

İstanbul’un tarihi ve kültürel zenginliklerini keşfetmek isteyenler için özel olarak tasarlanmış turlarımızla, Ayasofya’dan Sultanahmet Meydanı’na, Kapalıçarşı’dan Boğaz Turu’na kadar İstanbul’un en ikonik noktalarını keşfetme fırsatı sunuyoruz. Ayrıca, konforlu ve güvenli transfer araçlarımızla İstanbul’un havalimanlarından şehir merkezine veya otellere rahatlıkla ulaşmanızı sağlıyoruz.

Name: DOMINIQ s.r.o.
Description:
Autobusová doprava DOMINIQ je najmä o profesionálnom, ľudskom a individuálnom prístupe. 

Sme tu pre vás, aby sme vám poskytli pohodlné a spoľahlivé cestovanie. Už viac ako 32 rokov vozíme našich zákazníkov. Naše autobusy a mikrobusy sú s našou dlhoročnou skúsenosťou a profesionálnym prístupom pripravené na odjazd.

Naša flotila autobusov je moderná a dobre udržiavaná. Sme hrdí na to, že sme schopní poskytnúť široký výber vozidiel, aby sme vyhoveli rôznym potrebám a požiadavkám našich zákazníkov. Bez ohľadu na to, či potrebujete prepraviť malú skupinu ľudí alebo organizovať veľkú skupinovú akciu, sme tu pre vás. Okrem toho, že poskytujeme prepravu, sme tiež tu, aby sme vám pomohli s plánovaním vašej cesty.

Naši vodiči sú zruční a skúsení profesionáli, ktorí majú vynikajúce znalosti dopravy. Sme presvedčení, že bezpečnosť je na prvom mieste, a preto sa vždy snažíme dodržiavať všetky bezpečnostné normy a predpisy. Preto pohoda a bezpečnosť klientov počas celej cesty sú pre nás veľmi dôležité.

Veríme, že náš tím je našou najväčšou silou. Sme zložený z oddaných ľudí, ktorí majú vášeň pre autobusovú dopravu a sú pripravení vám poskytnúť vynikajúcu službu. Sme tu pre vás 24 hodín denne, 7 dní v týždni, aby sme zabezpečili vašu pohodlnú a bezproblémovú cestu.

Name: Tempest Tour
Description:
Tempest Tour, 1993 yılında kurulmuş ve TÜRSAB A Grubu Seyahat Acentası sertifikasına sahip bir turizm şirketidir.

Incoming Turist Operasyonları, Uluslararası Toplantı Organizasyonları, Bölge Turları ve Yolcu Taşımacılığı alanlarında faaliyet göstermektedir. Uluer Group’un ilk köklü şirketlerinden olan Tempest Tour, İstanbul merkezli operasyonları ile Uzak Doğulu grupların incoming turlarını düzenlemiş, Çin ve Hong Kong’dan Türkiye’ye turist getiren ilk A Grubu Seyahat Acentelerinden biri olmuş, uzun yıllar Ankara - Çayhane Sokak’ta Uluslararası kuruluşların üst düzey toplantı ve etkinliklerini başarıyla organize etmiştir.

***

Tempest Tour is a tourism company that was established in 1993 and has a 
"Group A Travel Agency" certificate of TURSAB (Association of Turkish Travel 
Agencies).

It operates in the fields of incoming tourist operations, international meeting 
organizations, regional tours, and passenger transportation. As one of the first 
well-established companies of Uluer Group, Tempest Tour organized 
incoming tours of Far Eastern groups with its Istanbul-based operations and 
became one of the first "Group A Travel Agencies" to bring tourists from China 
and Hong Kong to Turkey. For many years, it successfully organized 
high-level meetings and events of international institutions on Cayhane Street 
in Ankara.

Tempest Tour, Turkish Airlines Holidays Yetkili Acentesi olarak, hem yurt içi hem de yurt dışı destinasyonlara yönelik seyahat hizmetleri sunmaktadır.

Bu kapsamda; müşterilere, uçak + otel + transfer paketleri yanında, yalnızca otel rezervasyonu gibi esnek seçenekler de sunulabilmektedir. Turkish Airlines’ın resmi sistemleriyle entegre çalışan bu yapı sayesinde, farklı bütçe ve tercihlere uygun tatil planları kolayca oluşturulmaktadır.

Kapadokya merkezli ekibimiz, bölgeye gelen misafirlerine yönelik konaklama, tur ve ulaşım hizmetlerini de doğrudan yönetmektedir.

Name: Seatravel.fo
Description:
Seatreavel.fo is a company that specializes in providing sightseeing and fishing tours in the beautiful Faroe Islands. Our tours take you to some of the most breathtaking locations in the islands, including the iconic Drangarnir seastacks, the stunning Mulafossur waterfall, and the picturesque village of Mykines.

Our sightseeing tours are designed to give you a comprehensive and immersive experience of the Faroe Islands' natural beauty. You'll get to explore breathtaking landscapes, learn about the islands' rich culture and history, and discover the unique flora and fauna that can only be found here.

For those who love fishing, we also offer a variety of fishing tours that take you to some of the best spots in the Faroe Islands to catch cod and halibut. Whether you're an experienced angler or a beginner, our experienced guides will help you make the most of your fishing trip and make sure you have a great time.

At Seatreavel.fo, we pride ourselves on providing high-quality tours at an affordable price. We have a team of friendly and knowledgeable guides who are passionate about the Faroe Islands and are dedicated to making sure that every tour is a memorable experience. Book a tour with us today and discover why the Faroe Islands are one of the most beautiful and unique places in the world.

With a dedicated local team, personalized service, and carefully designed itineraries, Aimar Always Cruise combines the warmth of Indonesian hospitality with the freedom of ocean travel — creating intimate and meaningful adventures at sea.

Whether you’re seeking a private escape, a romantic getaway, or an open trip with new friends, we make sure every moment onboard feels special, relaxed, and truly yours.

We don't just cruise - we create days you'll always remember.

Perfect for pub crawls, birthday celebrations, bachelor/bachelorette parties, brewery tours, themed nights out and sight-seeing - the possibilities are endless!

Name: Pinna Autoservizi - Luxury Chauffeur & Limousine
Description: Pinna Autoservizi is a leading provider of chauffeur-driven car rental (NCC) services in Sardinia, particularly in the Costa Smeralda, Porto Cervo, Porto Rotondo, Olbia, and throughout northern Sardinia. For over 40 years, we have been offering exclusive transfers to and from ports, airports, heliports, and hotels across the island, guaranteeing the highest quality service, available 24/7. We have been in the industry for 40 years. Our sole policy is complete customer satisfaction, offering a quality service with high standards, both in terms of the vehicles we have available and the staff assigned to each vehicle, capable of meeting the most diverse needs. Each vehicle is driven by professional, highly specialized, and discreet chauffeurs, ready to meet any travel need, from business to private transfers. Why choose us? Experience and reliability. Over 40 years of experience in the chauffeur-driven car rental (NCC) sector. — Maximum Quality. Name: The San Francisco Tour Co. | SFTC
Description:
The San Francisco Tour Co. offers a range of premium tours throughout San Francisco and the wider Bay Area, from expertly guided 3-hour city highlights tours to completely bespoke private charters. We provide authentic and memorable experiences, showcasing the region's iconic landmarks and hidden gems. We are proud to be the first tour company in the Bay Area to offer tours in the modern, all-electric VW ID Buzz van, providing a unique, sustainable, and comfortable travel experience.

Our tours are led by passionate and knowledgeable local guides who share their insider perspectives and captivating stories, bringing the city's rich history and vibrant culture to life. We offer meticulously planned city tours, designed to maximize your time and showcase the best of San Francisco, as well as fully customizable private charters for those seeking a truly personalized adventure.

At The San Francisco Tour Co., we cater to a diverse range of travelers, from first-time visitors seeking a comprehensive overview to seasoned explorers looking for unique, tailored experiences. We prioritize small-group tours and private charters, ensuring an engaging atmosphere. We are dedicated to providing exceptional service and creating lasting memories of your time in one of the world's great cities.

Name: Semperoper Erleben
Description:
Tauchen Sie ein in die Welt der Semperoper!
Eine Besichtigung der Semperoper gehört fast schon zum Pflichtprogramm für jeden Dresden-Besucher. SEMPEROPER ERLEBEN bietet einzigartige und vielfältige Führungen durch die Semperoper Dresden an.
Von der regulären Führung über exklusive Themenrundgänge bis hin zu Erlebnistouren für Kinder und Schüler – hier ist für jeden etwas dabei.
Entdecken Sie die beeindruckende Geschichte der Semperoper, das formvollendete Kunsthandwerk und das einzigartige Flair der Opernwelt und lassen Sie sich von den reich verzierten Räumlichkeiten verzaubern. Erfahren Sie alles zur ereignisreichen Geschichte dieses glanzvollen Hauses, zu seinen Künstlern und seinen Geheimnissen - als Höhepunkt öffnet sich Ihnen schließlich der glanzvolle Zuschauersaal mit über 1300 Plätzen.

Name: NAGA

 Por que escolher a NAGA?

Carros de Luxo e Blindados: Garantimos conforto absoluto aliado à segurança máxima, para que você chegue ao seu destino com tranquilidade e estilo.
Motoristas Altamente Qualificados: Profissionais treinados para oferecer discrição, eficiência e um atendimento excepcional.
Serviço Exclusivo e Personalizado: Planejamos cada trajeto para atender às suas necessidades, seja uma viagem de negócios, eventos de alto nível ou deslocamentos privados.
Pontualidade Inquestionável: Sabemos que seu tempo é valioso. Na NAGA, a precisão nos horários não é uma meta, é um compromisso.
 Nossa missão é transformar cada deslocamento em uma experiência única, onde conforto e exclusividade andam lado a lado. Oferecemos soluções de mobilidade que permitem a você focar no que realmente importa, enquanto cuidamos de cada detalhe da sua jornada.

 Seja para líderes empresariais, executivos ou clientes exigentes, a NAGA é mais do que um transporte – é uma extensão do seu estilo de vida.

Conecte-se conosco no LinkedIn e descubra como podemos proporcionar uma experiência de mobilidade à altura da sua excelência. NAGA Transportes e Logística – Porque cada trajeto merece ser memorável.

Our carefully curated excursions offer the opportunity to snorkel in crystal-clear waters, explore hidden beaches, visit breathtaking waterfalls, enjoy fresh local seafood, and discover remote fishing villages accessible only by boat. Whether you are planning a romantic getaway, a family adventure, a corporate event, or a group excursion for up to 150 guests, we tailor each tour to meet your needs.

With a team of professional guides, a deep understanding of the region, and a dedication to excellence, we ensure a seamless and memorable experience. More than just a boat tour, we offer a journey through the best of Puerto Vallarta.

Deneyimli ve profesyonel ekibimiz, yenilikçi çözümlerimiz ve müşteri memnuniyetine verdiğimiz önem ile her detayı titizlikle planlayarak hayallerinizi gerçeğe dönüştürmek için çalışıyoruz. Etkinliklerinizin her anını mükemmel kılmak adına, kaliteli hizmet ve yaratıcı yaklaşımlar sunmaktayız.

Yurt içi ve yurt dışı turlar, kültürel geziler, iş seyahatleri ve tatil paketleri gibi geniş bir yelpazede kişiselleştirilmiş ve kaliteli turizm hizmetleri sunar. Deneyimli ve profesyonel ekibimizle, her seyahati unutulmaz kılmak için titizlikle çalışıyor, yüksek kalite standartlarında konforlu ve güvenli seyahat deneyimleri sağlıyoruz. Somos especializados em oferecer um serviço de transferências confiável, seguro e confortável para qualquer parte da ilha, com foco particular nas transferências de e para o aeroporto, seu destino e retorno, bem como as transferências intermunicipais.

Nossa equipe está empenhada em proporcionar a melhor experiência possível. Com motoristas profissionais, uma frota de veículos modernos e um atendimento excepcional ao cliente, nos esforçamos para superar as expectativas em cada viagem.

Com anos de experiência no setor e uma aposta inabalável na satisfação do cliente, a TransferMadeira tornou-se a opção preferida para quem procura transferências de qualidade na ilha. Junte-se a nós e descubra a diferença que podemos fazer na sua próxima viagem à Madeira.

Name: Vittoria Rent
Description:
Vittoria Rent è una società specializzata nel noleggio di scooter, con sede a Roma. Con una solida esperienza nel settore del turismo e una passione innata per i veicoli a due ruote, ci dedichiamo a offrire ai nostri clienti un'esperienza di viaggio straordinaria nella città eterna.

La nostra flotta di scooter è composta da mezzi affidabili e di alta qualità, pronti per portarti alla scoperta di Roma in modo comodo e divertente. Siamo appassionati di motori e conosciamo la città come le nostre tasche, il che ci consente di consigliarti itinerari suggestivi e mete imperdibili.

Presso Vittoria Rent, ci impegniamo per fornire un servizio clienti impeccabile. Siamo sempre pronti ad assisterti nella scelta del veicolo giusto per le tue esigenze di viaggio e a rispondere a tutte le tue domande. La tua sicurezza e il tuo comfort sono la nostra priorità.

Scegliendo Vittoria Rent, scegli un partner affidabile per esplorare Roma in totale libertà. Rendiamo la tua visita a questa città straordinaria un'esperienza indimenticabile. Affitta uno dei nostri scooter di alta qualità e scopri la bellezza di Roma con il vento tra i capelli. Contattaci oggi stesso per prenotare la tua avventura su due ruote!

Name: PORTO CRISTO NAUTAS S.L.
Description:
Viajes Marítimos Delfín Negro es una empresa familiar con más de 30 años de experiencia en excursiones en barco por la zona norte de Mallorca.

Ofrecemos tres rutas diferentes: Playa Formentor, Parque Natural y Cap de Menorca. Todas las salidas se realizan desde el Puerto de Can Picafort.

Disponemos de una embarcación clásica de madera con fondo de cristal y capacidad para 245 pasajeros, equipada con servicio de bar y aseos.

Durante la travesía, costeamos los puntos más destacados de la zona y realizamos paradas para baño en lugares seleccionados.

Nuestro equipo de tripulantes, con amplio conocimiento de la costa local, ofrece un trato cercano y familiar, compartiendo información básica sobre el entorno y la fauna marina durante el recorrido.


Viajes Marítimos Delfín Negro is a family-run company with over 30 years of experience offering boat excursions along the northern coast of Mallorca.

We offer three different routes: Playa Formentor, the Natural Park, and Cap de Menorca. All departures take place from the Port of Can Picafort.

Our vessel is a classic wooden boat with a glass bottom and a capacity for 245 passengers. It is equipped with a bar and restroom facilities.

During the trip, we follow the coastline’s most scenic spots and make selected stops for swimming.

Our crew, highly familiar with the local coast, provides a friendly and welcoming atmosphere, sharing basic information about the surroundings and marine life along the way.

Nuestro complejo cuenta con un tradicional sistema de aerosillas que permite disfrutar de vistas panorámicas inigualables del lago San Roque, las sierras y la ciudad. Además, brindamos una amplia variedad de actividades recreativas, senderos, espacios gastronómicos y propuestas familiares que combinan seguridad, innovación y contacto con el entorno natural.
Trabajamos con un fuerte compromiso hacia el desarrollo turístico sustentable, la calidad en la atención al visitante y la mejora continua de nuestros servicios.

Name: Anker Travel DMC
Description:
Established in 1993 as a Group A Travel Agency, Anker Travel has proudly served the travel industry for over three decades. In 1995, the company earned its IATA membership certificate, further solidifying its commitment to international standards and excellence.
Over the years, Anker Travel has steadily expanded its portfolio of services. Today, our dedicated team of 22 professionals offers comprehensive expertise in both domestic and international hotel and tour reservations, airline ticketing, cruise and ferry bookings, as well as the organization of congresses and meetings.
Our mission is to deliver precise information and prompt, error-free service, ensuring a seamless experience for every client we serve.

We are deeply honored to have earned the trust and loyalty of our valued friends and partners, both within Türkiye and across international borders. Their continued confidence in our services is a source of great pride and motivation.
While we are grateful for the progress we have made, we do not consider it sufficient. With the same passion and dedication that marked our very first day, we remain committed to learning, evolving, and enhancing the quality of our offerings. Our unwavering goal is to deliver exceptional service and earn the enduring trust of those we serve.
Continuous improvement and innovation are at the core of our mission to ensure customer satisfaction. We strive to provide the highest standard of service to both institutions and individuals, adapting to their needs with precision and care.
Our journey forward is fueled by the expertise and dedication of our team—each member a specialist in their field—whose performance continues to elevate our organization.
We would like to express our sincere gratitude to all our customers, employees, and business partners for their invaluable contributions to our success. We wish each of you continued health, happiness, and prosperity.

Name: Oasis Express Ltd
Description:
As an owner of a mini bus company in Bermuda, I am delighted to offer you the complete freedom to customize your very own tour or shuttle service for any special event taking place on the Island. Whether it's for a wedding, birthday party, corporate function, or any other special occasion, our mini buses offer the perfect transportation solution to make your event a memorable one.
 
 Our fleet of top-of-the-line mini buses typically seats between 14-20 passengers, thereby providing an intimate setting that is perfect for small to medium-sized groups. Moreover, our experienced drivers are knowledgeable of Bermuda roads and top attractions, ensuring that your guests are safely and comfortably transported to and from your event.
 
 For weddings, we specialize in picking up guests from the airport or other designated places and shuttle them to the event location. Apart from that, we can arrange for “wedding trolley” style pick-ups and transport guests on exclusive and comfortable minibus tours around Bermuda Islands, which could be followed by dropping off at the wedding reception.
 
 For birthday parties, we can tailor the bus tour around different stops, including pubs, restaurants, or other fun-filled locations where you can celebrate your birthday in style. We can play custom playlists or hire a live DJ to provide musical entertainment and ensure that the energy remains high throughout the entire ride.
 
 Apart from these, our mini bus tours can be customized to suit the specific requirements of your group, taking you to secret beaches, historic landmarks, forts, coves, and much more. We can also stop at different locations for photo opportunities or break for drinks and food.
 
 So, whatever the occasion may be, we are confident that we can provide you with the perfect mini-bus tour or shuttle service for a memorable and joyous experience. We look forward to hearing about your unique requirements and to tailor your perfect tour.

Name: Friends Guides
Description:
Friends Guides is a premium experiences company in Mexico City that transforms the way people travel. Instead of traditional guides, we offer local friends who accompany travelers to discover the city in an authentic, fun, and worry-free way.

Each experience is designed to make our guests feel part of a group of friends, with personalized attention, comfortable transportation, and an exclusive atmosphere that makes all the difference.

Our core values —Human Connection, Cultural Empathy, Responsible Tourism, Exclusivity, and Global Friendship— guide everything we do.

At Friends Guides, we believe traveling is not just about seeing a destination, but about creating memories and friendships that last a lifetime.
Location: Mexico City, At Friends Guides, sustainability is part of every journey we offer. We design experiences that support local economies, minimize environmental impact, and promote conscious travel. Our tours are intentionally small to reduce over-tourism, and we prioritize local transportation, small family-run businesses, and low-waste practices. We also train our hosts in responsible tourism, cultural preservation, and how to educate travelers about environmental awareness. Sustainability for us is not a trend—it’s a commitment to protecting the places we love while sharing them with the world in a respectful, lasting way.

Name: Richfield Bus Company
Description:
Richfield Bus Company has been proudly serving Minnesota and the greater Midwest since 1959, providing safe, reliable charter transportation for groups of all sizes. Family-owned and community-focused, we’re committed to keeping people and vehicles moving forward through trusted service and expert mechanical care.

Our Mission

Together, we keep people and vehicles moving forward — by delivering trusted transportation and expert mechanical care.

Our Vision

To lead the way in moving people and maintaining vehicles by delivering innovative solutions and safe, dependable service every day.

Our Core Values

Safety – We protect what matters with a mindset of awareness and care in every mile and every repair.

Teamwork – We move forward together through open communication and support for one another.

Excellence – We bring our best to every job, taking pride in professionalism, detail, and service quality.

People – We put people first — leading, serving, and succeeding with respect, trust, and integrity.

What We Do

We provide charter transportation across the continental United States and Canada, with a versatile fleet ranging from executive SUVs to 60-passenger motorcoaches. Whether traveling for school trips, corporate events, sports teams, church groups, or special occasions, we deliver flexible, dependable transportation tailored to your needs.

Why Choose Us

With nearly 60 years of experience, a culture grounded in safety and service, and a team that truly cares, we’re dedicated to providing a comfortable, professional, and worry-free travel experience — every mile of the way.

Learn more or request a quote: www.richfieldbus.com

Our passion for Santorini extends to organizing unforgettable experiences that showcase the island’s unique attractions. From exploring the ancient caldera on a volcano tour to sailing the azure waters on a catamaran, we curate tours that capture the essence of Santorini. Our shore excursions are designed to immerse you in the local culture and natural beauty, while our car rental services offer the freedom to explore at your own pace.

Photography enthusiasts will find our photoshoot services irresistible, offering professional captures of your Santorini moments against the backdrop of its breathtaking landscapes.

Our goal is to not only enhance your Santorini visit but to also streamline your planning process. With an emphasis on maximizing online and physical sales at our port-based office, we strive to make booking your island adventures as effortless as possible. We are committed to gathering valuable data and resources, aiming to expand our services to more islands and bring the magic of the Greek Isles to a wider audience.

Join us in exploring Santorini and beyond, as we promise to make your experience memorable, convenient, and tailored to your desires. Let’s embark on this journey together, where adventure meets relaxation and where every service we offer is a step towards an unforgettable island escape.

Name: Little Joy Turizm
Description:
Gap turları, Türkiye’nin Güneydoğu Anadolu Bölgesi’nin tarihi, kültürel ve doğal zenginliklerini keşfetmek isteyenler için en özel rotalardan biridir. Midyat’nın kadim şehirlerinden modern kentlere uzanan bu yolculuk, hem geçmişin izlerini hem de günümüzün renkli yaşamını bir arada sunar. Gap turu sırasında Gaziantep’in mutfağı, Şanlıurfa’nın Balıklıgöl’ü, Mardin’in taş konakları, Diyarbakır surları ve Halfeti gibi duraklar keşfedilir. Karadeniz turları sayesinde hem doğayı keşfetmek hem de bölgenin sıcak insanlarıyla tanışmak mümkündür. Karadeniz tur, sadece bir gezi değil, aynı zamanda kültürel bir yolculuktur. Doğu Karadeniz turu ile dağların zirvesinde sisli yaylalarda huzur bulunurken, Batı Karadeniz turu ile tarih ve doğa bir arada yaşanır. En uygun Karadeniz turları fiyatları ve farklı seçeneklerle planlanan bu yolculuklarda, her ziyaretçi kendi beklentilerine uygun bir rota bulabilir. Karadeniz turu fiyatları farklılık gösterse de burada asıl önemli olan şey, doğanın ve kültürün sunduğu unutulmaz deneyimlerdir. Ege turları yalnızca kara yoluyla değil, aynı zamanda denizden de unutulmaz deneyimler yaşatır. Ege tekne turu, berrak koylarda yüzme molaları ve huzur dolu bir yolculuk arayanların ilk tercihlerindendir. Ege tekne turu fiyatları farklılık gösterse de, Ege tekne turları ve Ege’de tekne turları kapsamında Kuş Adası Marmaris, Göcek ve Fethiye koyları en çok tercih edilen konumlardandır. Tekneyle Ege turu, sakin deniz günlerini romantik ve keyifli bir şekilde geçirmek isteyenler için idealdir. Ege bölgesi tekne turları hem yerli hem de yabancı turistlerin ilgisini çekerken, tekne turu Ege deneyimi tatilin en özel anılarından biri olur.
 İstanbul kültür turları ve günübirlik İstanbul kültür turları, hem tarihi hem de sanatsal açıdan zengin bir program sunar. Müze ziyaretleri, tarihi yapıların keşfi ve kültürel etkinlikler, bu turların öne çıkan özelliklerindendir.

Name: Best Campers România
Description:
BestCampers pentru visul împlinit și vacanța binemeritată

Ți-ar plăcea să te plimbi cu un hotel pe roți?
 
Suntem specializați în adevăratul spirit de aventură și stil de viață de camping. Modelele noastre de autorulote sunt cele mai noi modele de pe piață, cu maxim 1 an vechime.

Autorulotele noastre sunt foarte populare, pliindu-se perfect pe nevoile pieței.

Clienții noștri închiriază autorulote şi călătoresc la mare, la munte, în Deltă, în căldura verii și în frumusețile iernii. Sună interesant, nu-i așa? Și este interesant. Autorulotele sunt mereu în natură, lângă focuri de tabără, în ploaie și în zăpadă. Oamenii gătesc și dorm confortabil în autorulotele noastre.

 Ai nevoie de energizare și motivare în echipa ta?

Vacanțe neconvenționale cu un hotel pe roți și schimbarea panoramei, zilnic, cu o autorulotă de lux.
Împreună cu echipa vei fi în trendul neconvenționalului în vacante: discreție, intimitate, natura, wifi, roboți care îți oferă all inclusive.

 Soluții pentru stilul tău de viață cu echipa pentru vacanțe în mișcare:

 Premiere angajați
 Teambuilding
 Fidelizare
 Atragerea de noi talente

Name: GrabskaSailing.pl
Description:
GrabskaSailing.pl to połączenie 25 lat w doświadczenia w branży finansowej i wiedzy inwestycyjnej z pasją do podróżowania i miłością do morza. Główną misją marki którą stworzyłam, jest pomaganie innym w osiąganiu celów jednocześnie spełniając marzenia, a naszym mottem jest „Nowy wymiar żeglowania” 

 Jestem właścicielką kancelarii finansowej Vivamus i biura nieruchomości Grabska.pl, jak również trenerem biznesu, coachem i mentorem, jednak w moich żyłach płynie żeglarska krew. Tak szerokie doświadczenie i współpraca z najlepszymi specjalistami pozwala mi prowadzić firmę w najwyższym standardzie. Moim priorytetem jest poczucie bezpieczeństwa mojego Klienta oraz wsparcie w drodze do podejmowania w pełni świadomych decyzji biznesowych. 

 Oferuję turystyczne rejsy żeglarskie - grupowe i indywidualne. Moi Klienci mają możliwość wybrania rejsów na jachtach i katamaranach, podczas których korzystają z relaksu i wytchnienia od codzienności. To doskonałe rozwiązanie dla ludzi kochających wodę i aktywny wypoczynek w luksusowych warunkach. Aktualne programy organizowanych przez nas rejsów można śledzić na stronie  https://grabskasailing.pl 

 Oferowanym przez moją firmę rozwiązaniem dla firm, jest organizacja szkoleń motywacyjnych podczas rejsów żeglarskich. Uczestnicy podnoszą swoje kompetencje w bardzo atrakcyjnych, wakacyjnych okolicznościach, co bardzo pozytywnie wpływa na ich integrację. To zupełnie inny sposób na:  
 rozwój umiejętności przywódczych,
 rozwój umiejętności sprawnego zarządzania zespołem,
 rozwój umiejętności komunikacyjnych.
Ponadto, podczas outdoorowych szkoleń nasi Klienci odpoczywają od codziennych obowiązków liderskich, uciekają od rutyny, co pomaga w odświeżeniu perspektywy i pobudza kreatywne myślenie. 

 Jeżeli interesuje Cię nietuzinkowy sposób na szkolenia i rozwój lub relaks z dala od liderskich obowiązków zapraszam do kontaktu:
 663 300 300
 izabella@grabskasailing.pl
 https://grabskasailing.pl/

Flota: Contamos con una amplia gama de embarcaciones para satisfacer todas tus necesidades, desde yates de gran lujo hasta veleros clásicos.

Celebraciones: Celebra tu evento especial a bordo de una embarcación de ensueño. Bodas, despedidas de soltero, cumpleaños, aniversarios... cualquier ocasión es perfecta para celebrar en el mar!
Eventos corporativos: Impresiona a tus clientes o empleados con un evento corporativo único e inolvidable. 
Incentivos para empresas: Motiva a tu equipo con una experiencia de navegación que jamás olvidarán.

Name: Fly Costa Del Sol Málaga
Description:
La práctica de deporte al aire libre en parapente con motor biplaza es una de las sensaciones más increíbles que te puedas imaginar. Es una actividad muy segura. Nuestros equipos están homologados, contamos con un piloto con más de 20 años de experiencia y volamos con unas condiciones meteorológicas perfectas, para que sea una experiencia segura.

Siente la libertad con Fly Costa del Sol Málaga, disfruta de unas vistas espectaculares de la Costa del Sol desde el cielo y deléitate con los atardeceres desde un lugar privilegiado.

Tenemos el lugar perfecto para la práctica de este deporte: La Costa del Sol (Torre del Mar, Torrox, Nerja).

Con la ayuda de un monitor, conocerás la forma en la que funciona el parapente con motor y tendrás la oportunidad de pilotarlo. El vuelo en parapente con motor en Málaga es una actividad indispensable, no te la pierdas!

Conoce nuestros equipos, ofertas y vuela en parapente en Málaga.

Afin de satisfaire vos besoins, nous disposons d’une flotte composée de nombreuses véhicules à louer :

Economique : des automobiles récentes et idéales pour les petits budgets. Elles seront adaptées pour les trajets courts et la circulation en ville.
Automatique : des voitures avec boite automatiques, particulièrement appréciables lors des trajets en montagne ou dans les embouteillages.
Monospace : véhicule familial par excellence, le monospace vous permettra de profiter d’un grand confort grâce à son habitacle spacieux.
Electrique : louer une voiture électrique, c’est décider de découvrir l'île de la Réunion différemment, à bord d’une automobile silencieuse et moins polluant.
SUV/Crossover : les voitures de location robustes et confortables, à l’aise sur tous les terrains (aussi bien urbains que lors d'escapades sur des routes sinueuses).
Minibus : pour les groupes, les grandes familles, les personnes voulant beaucoup de places pour leurs bagages.

Nuestro enfoque va más allá del deporte. Creamos experiencias que transforman, fortalecen el cuerpo, expanden la mente y despiertan el alma. Rutas locales, escapadas de fin de semana, travesías nacionales e internacionales: cada experiencia está diseñada con profesionalismo, logística de alto nivel y una comunidad que inspira.

Trabajamos con empresas, viajeros internacionales, agencias aliadas y apasionados por la bicicleta, generando impacto positivo en el entorno y en cada persona que rueda con nosotros.

 Movimiento, conexión y propósito.
Eso es Espíritu de Montaña.

Name: Banff Explorer
Description:
Banff Explorer, your ultimate guide to experiencing the unparalleled beauty of Banff National Park and the surrounding Canadian Rockies. Whether you're an avid adventurer, a nature lover, or simply someone seeking a serene escape, Banff offers a world of opportunities to explore, connect with nature, and create unforgettable memories.

Nestled in the heart of the Canadian Rockies, Banff National Park is a UNESCO World Heritage site renowned for its towering mountains, crystal-clear lakes, and lush forests. With over 1,600 kilometers of hiking trails, world-class ski resorts, pristine alpine lakes like Lake Louise and Moraine Lake, and diverse wildlife, Banff is a destination that promises adventure, tranquility, and natural beauty year-round.

At Banff Explorer, we believe in showcasing the very best this iconic destination has to offer. Our mission is to inspire people to discover Banff's breathtaking landscapes, rich wildlife, and vibrant culture. We offer carefully curated travel experiences, expert local insights, and tailored itineraries designed to help you immerse yourself in the stunning surroundings, whether you’re hiking to mountain peaks, enjoying a relaxing boat tour, or experiencing winter activities like skiing and snowshoeing.

Why Banff Explorer?

Expert Knowledge: Our team consists of passionate locals who know the park’s hidden gems, from secret viewpoints to lesser-known trails.
Personalized Experiences: Whether you're seeking a family-friendly adventure or a thrilling backcountry expedition, we craft experiences that match your interests.
Sustainable Tourism: We are committed to preserving the natural beauty of Banff for future generations by promoting eco-friendly travel practices.
Let Banff Explorer be your trusted guide as you unlock the wonders of Banff and the surrounding Canadian Rockies. Discover why this pristine paradise is one of the most

Name: Haagse stadsfiets
Description:
De Haagse Stadsfiets: Groen-Geel Genieten op Twee Wielen

Ontdek Den Haag en Scheveningen op de beste manier: met De Haagse Stadsfiets, dé grootste fietsverhuurder van Zuid-Holland. Bekend van de iconische groen-gele fietsen, biedt De Haagse Stadsfiets jou de vrijheid om de stad en de kust in je eigen tempo te verkennen.

Onze fietsen zijn te huur op twee handige locaties:

In het hart van de stad, aan de Bierkade 19, perfect om het historische centrum en de mooiste grachten te ontdekken.

Dicht bij het strand, aan de Nieuwe Laantjes 141 in Scheveningen, ideaal voor een rit langs de boulevard of door de duinen.

Heb je een evenement, groep, of andere specifieke wensen? Geen probleem! We bezorgen onze fietsen ook op locatie. Met onze service, betrouwbaarheid en ruime beschikbaarheid staan we bekend als de nummer één fietsverhuurder van de regio.

Stap op een van onze frisse, comfortabele fietsen en geniet van alles wat Den Haag en Scheveningen te bieden hebben. Groen, geel en goed geregeld – dat is De Haagse Stadsfiets. Meer dan 850 fietsen op meerdere locaties.

Name: Lighthouses for Life
Description:
This business is dedicated to the mariners, lightkeepers and lighthouses representing the rich maritime history of Michigan. Through our social contacts, photos and products we strive to encourage people everywhere (but especially Michiganders) to take note of and to visit the lighthouses of Michigan.

I didn’t intentionally start out to photograph lighthouses but somewhere along the way it just became a thing that I did. When I wanted to travel not too far away from home I would look at the map and see all the lighthouse icons on the Great Lakes and decide to go there. Eventually, having visited and photographed many of the lights and having gained an interest in the history and value of these icons of the Great Lakes I made the decision to find all of Michigan’s lighthouses and photograph every one of them. So many of them had been in disrepair and in danger of “extinction”.  Many had already been torn down never to be seen again by an interested public. I used to dream of photographing endangered species and though I chose different directions perhaps it was the desire to “preserve” that held the lure for me to continue my expeditions. 

Getting to the  80 lighthouses that were accessible by car was a pretty easy task. Time consuming to be sure but all I had to do was follow the map and head in the direction of the lighthouse that I wanted to see. I was super excited when I thought I had completed getting to all of the lights until I learned that were 50 more that I had to photograph that were not accessible by car. They were the island and crib lights that would require the use of a boat (or in some cases a plane). This is where, in my mind, the ultimate adventure would begin. I didn’t own a boat so I had to figure out how to get out on the water. Long story short, I figured it out and the adventures were amazing. The people that I met along the way were helpful and kind and pleasant to be with, quite fantastic.

Hizmetlerimizle Fark Yaratıyoruz:

VIP Hizmet Anlayışı: Konforunuz ve memnuniyetiniz en büyük önceliğimizdir. Havalimanı transferlerinden lüks konaklamaya, rehberlik hizmetlerinden özel ikramlara kadar her detay, ayrıcalıklı bir yolculuk için titizlikle planlanır. Misafirlerimize sunduğumuz kişiselleştirilmiş hizmetlerle, ibadetlerini ve keşiflerini en üst düzey konforla gerçekleştirmelerini sağlıyoruz.

Siyer Umresi ile Derin Keşif: Klasik umre programlarının ötesine geçerek, Tarihçi-Yazar Zafer İhtiyar gibi alanında uzman isimler eşliğinde Siyer Umresi programları düzenliyoruz. Bu özel turlar sayesinde, Peygamber Efendimiz'in (S.A.V) hayatına ışık tutan, sıradan acentaların rotasına dahil etmediği tarihi ve manevi mekanları keşfetme fırsatı sunuyoruz. Bilgi ve tefekkürle dolu, eşsiz bir deneyim vaat ediyoruz.

Huzur Temelli Yaklaşım: Adımızda da taşıdığımız "Huzur" ilkesiyle, yolculuğunuzun başından sonuna kadar her anınızda içsel bir dinginlik ve güven hissetmenizi sağlıyoruz. Autocash to nie tylko tradycyjna wypożyczalnia samochodów, ale firma, która kładzie nacisk na innowacje, elastyczność i wygodę dla swoich klientów. Kluczowe elementy, które sprawiają, że wyróżniamy się na tle konkurencji.
Flota pojazdów dostosowana do każdego klienta
Autocash oferuje szeroką gamę pojazdów, od ekonomicznych hatchbacków po luksusowe SUV-y, oraz samochody dostawcze. Wyróżnia nas dbałość o różnorodność floty, aby zaspokoić potrzeby każdego klienta. Bez względu na to, czy podróżujesz służbowo, rodziną czy w pojedynkę, Autocash ma pojazd dostosowany do Twoich preferencji i wymagań.
Nowoczesne rozwiązania rezerwacji
Chcąc być o krok dalej, oferujemy nowoczesne rozwiązania mobilnej obsługi klienta. Strona internetowa firmy umożliwia łatwe i szybkie rezerwacje oraz realne koszty wypożyczenia pojazdu. To nie tylko oszczędza czas, ale także zapewnia klientom pełną kontrolę nad swoimi wydatkami, miejscem i czasem odbioru samochodu.
Rabaty za lojalność
Autocash docenia swoich stałych klientów, wprowadzając program lojalnościowy, który nagradza regularnych użytkowników. Dodatkowe korzyści, takie jak bezpłatne aktualizacje pojazdów, zniżki czy dodatkowe ubezpieczenia, sprawiają, że korzystanie z usług Autocash staje się bardziej atrakcyjne dla tych, którzy decydują się na stałą współpracę.

 Zapytaj o ofertę już dziś i doświadcz swobody podróżowania!

Name: RERA Canada
Description:
RERA Canada is dedicated to preserving and protecting Canada’s rich rail heritage.  

Our mission is to locate, stabilize, procure, and transport historic rare locomotives, ensuring their relocation for operational use. We are committed to the preservation and restoration of historic railway equipment, executing complex moves over land and rail to facilitate the enjoyment and education of future generations. Through our efforts, we aim to safeguard the legacy of Canadian railways, allowing others to experience and appreciate this vital part of our history.

RERA Canada is a nonprofit corporation, registered in 2024.

RERA Canada is working with the US-based Railroad Equipment Restoration Association (RERA), who owns three locomotives and various rail cars that were acquired from the bankruptcy trustee for the former York-Durham Heritage Rail. RERA has operated trackage in Central Pennsylvania since 2018. RERA locates, stabilizes, procures, and ships several historic rare locomotives relocating them for operations and/or brokering sales. 

RERA key goals is the preservation and restoration of historic railway equipment executing complex moves over land and rail of railway equipment to facilitate preservation of history for others to enjoy.

Name: Pegaso Tour
Description:
Scopri Roma in modo innovativo e sostenibile con Pegaso Tour! 

Pegaso Tour nasce dalla passione e dall’esperienza trentennale di Pegaso Limo, leader nei trasporti di lusso, per offrire un nuovo modo di vivere la Città Eterna. I nostri tour guidati su E-Tuk elettrici combinano comfort, sostenibilità e una prospettiva unica, permettendoti di esplorare i luoghi più iconici di Roma in modo intimo e personalizzato.

Con driver esperti e audio-guide in inglese, i nostri tour sono pensati per chi desidera vivere un’esperienza immersiva senza rinunciare al rispetto per l’ambiente. Ogni angolo di Roma racconta una storia e noi siamo qui per fartela scoprire con il massimo della cura e dell’attenzione.

 Perché scegliere Pegaso Tour?
 Sostenibilità: Veicoli 100% elettrici per un turismo a basso impatto ambientale.
 Esperienza su misura: Itinerari personalizzati per soddisfare ogni tua curiosità.
 Qualità garantita: Radicata nella tradizione di eccellenza di Pegaso Limo.

Che tu sia un viaggiatore curioso, un amante della storia o semplicemente in cerca di un’avventura diversa, Pegaso Tour è la scelta ideale per scoprire Roma da un nuovo punto di vista.

 Unisciti a noi per un viaggio indimenticabile!
#PegasoTour #ETukTour #Sostenibilità #Roma #EsperienzeUniche

Name: Wanna Go Travel Turkey
Description:
About us:

At Wanna Go Travel, we bring Turkey's rich tapestry of history, culture, and natural beauty to life with unforgettable travel experiences. Specializing in personalized tours and comprehensive travel packages, we cater to the unique interests and preferences of each traveler. Whether you're exploring the vibrant streets of Istanbul, marveling at the surreal landscapes of Cappadocia, or relaxing in the thermal waters of Pamukkale, our expert team ensures a seamless and enriching journey.

Our Services:

- Tailored Tours: From historical landmarks to hidden gems, we design customized itineraries that showcase the best of Turkey.
- Group Adventures: Join like-minded travelers on our group tours, perfect for making new friends while exploring Turkey’s wonders.
- Private Excursions: Enjoy exclusive, personalized tours with experienced guides who bring Turkey’s stories to life.
- Cultural Immersions: Dive deep into local traditions, cuisine, and crafts with our authentic cultural experiences.
- Luxury Travel: Indulge in our premium services, including private yacht charters, boutique accommodations, and bespoke travel arrangements.

Why Choose Us:

-Expertise: Our team of seasoned travel professionals has extensive knowledge of Turkey’s destinations, ensuring you receive the most accurate and insightful information.
- Personalization: We take pride in crafting personalized travel experiences that match your interests, whether it’s adventure, relaxation, history, or culture.
- Customer Satisfaction: Your satisfaction is our priority. We offer responsive support and tailored solutions to make your trip memorable and hassle-free.
- Sustainability: We are committed to sustainable tourism practices, supporting local communities, and preserving Turkey’s natural and cultural heritage.

Description: Magnificent Travel ( Macera Tur Turizm Seyahat Acentasi Ltd Sti ) was founded in 1997 and is an independent Turkish tour operator and travel agency specializing in private, small group and cultural tours in Egypt, Greece, Morocco and Jordan. Magnificent Travel has created a balance of guided sightseeing & leisure time. We have such an outstanding program of sightseeing & unique premium highlights which you would otherwise pay extra for. You will be treated to features, such as an ascent of the Pramids in Egypt, the fairy chimneys in Turkey, a Greek Islands cruise through the Aegean Sea and much more. Enjoy the major sites with an expert guide who will provide insights into history and culture. Because there is plenty of free time on the tours, you will have time for your own independent discoveries. We are a tour operator specializing in tailor-made travel packages, christian tours, jewish tours, biblical and religious tours, offering a variety of combinations to organize almost any specialized wishes for individual travelers and groups.
